title: clematis aspleniifolia var. boissieriana
intro: Clematis aspleniifolia var. boissieriana, also known as Boissier's Clematis, is a flowering plant species belonging to the Clematis genus. It has been used in traditional medicine, particularly in China and other parts of Asia, for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antiviral, and antibacterial properties. The plant is believed to have several health benefits, such as reducing fever, alleviating pain, and treating respiratory issues like bronchitis and coughs. In traditional Chinese medicine, the plant is used to prepare herbal teas, infusions, and decoctions, as well as being used in the production of herbal remedies, such as capsules and tablets.
